home.title: Private Care Laundry — Special Care for Every Garment
home.description: Premium laundry service with separate washing for each customer. Free pickup, 24h turnaround, and real-time tracking in the UAE.

appPromo.title: First pick up for free.
appPromo.description: Download the app now and get free pickup, delivery, and 20% off your first order.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Every request is handled with utmost care and individually, to ensure the highest levels of privacy.

savingBags.title: Saving Bags
savingBags.description: Fill a bag with up to 15 items for one fixed price — save more with bulk laundry

clothesWashing.title: Cloths Washing
clothesWashing.description: Professional care for your everyday wear — fresh, clean, and ready to go

shoeCleaning.title: Shoe Cleaning
shoeCleaning.description: Deep cleaning that restores your shoes — careful treatment for every material

bagsCleaning.title: Bags Cleaning
bagsCleaning.description: Expert care for handbags and travel bags — clean, polished, and elegant

carpetCleaning.title: Carpet Cleaning
carpetCleaning.description: Removes dust, stains, and odors — brings back freshness and comfort

homeItems.title: Home Items
homeItems.description: Cleaning for curtains, blankets, and more — soft, fresh, and spotless

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Every request is handled with utmost care and individually, to ensure the highest levels of privacy.

schedule.title: Schedule Pickup
schedule.description: Choose a date and time that works for you through our app or website.

pickup.title: We Pick Up
pickup.description: Our driver arrives at your door with laundry bags – no sorting needed.

clean.title: We Clean
clean.description: Every order is washed separately with premium detergents and expert care.

delivery.title: Delivered Fresh
delivery.description: Clean, fresh, and perfectly presented – right to your doorstep.

why.title: Why Private Care Laundry
why.description: Private Care Laundry ensures every order is washed separately for complete hygiene and privacy, delivering premium care you can trust.

turnaround.title: 24h Turnaround
turnaround.description: From pickup to delivery within 24 hours, same-day express also available.

insured.title: Fully Insured
insured.description: Every garment insured up to 500 AED, full responsibility for rare damage.

tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
tracking.description: Track your order from pickup to delivery with accurate real-time updates.

eco.title: Eco-Friendly
eco.description: Biodegradable detergents used with energy-efficient machines for clean care.

testimonials.label: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.quote: "I really appreciate how straightforward the laundry service is and how quickly their customer support responds. I can't see myself managing without it"

download.title: Get the Private Care experience.
download.description: Book, track, and enjoy effortless laundry service.

faq.title: Here are a few things you might be wondering.

separate.question: Do you wash clothes separately?
separate.answer: Yes, every order is washed individually to ensure maximum hygiene, privacy, and care. Simply schedule through the app, and our team will collect and deliver your items at your preferred time.

pickup.question: How does pickup and delivery work?
pickup.answer: Schedule a pickup through our app, leave your items ready, and our team will collect and return them cleaned within 24 hours.

pricing.question: How is pricing calculated?
pricing.answer: We offer transparent pricing per item, saving bags, and specialty services. View our Prices page or check the app for a detailed quote.

insurance.question: Are my garments insured?
insurance.answer: Yes, every garment is insured up to 500 AED. We take full responsibility in the rare event of damage.

areas.question: Which areas do you serve?
areas.answer: We currently serve major areas across the UAE. Enter your address in the app to confirm availability in your location.
